entries.title: No server-side enum validation on severity/status/target_executor — typo from non-CLI caller could store invalid value
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T3: added CHECK constraints via migration 202606100002 + runtime validate_finding_enums() in create/update paths. Commit deba5ab7.
entries.note: Cheap to add CHECK constraints in migration or runtime match!().

entries.title: Duplicated finding ID generation across handler and DB layer
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T3: extracted mint_finding_id() into findings module; handler uses it. Commit deba5ab7.
entries.note: Single source of truth for ID mint.

entries.title: CLI status HTTP timeout unbounded — slow daemon could freeze CLI
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T3: already resolved — DaemonClient enforces DEFAULT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT=30s. Documented in run.rs. Commit deba5ab7.

entries.title: List query may skip index for cross-creator patterns
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T3: EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN audit documented in list_findings doc comment — all three indexes utilized. Commit deba5ab7.

entries.title: Runtime sqlx query not compile-time checked (count_open_findings_by_severity)
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T3: investigated compile-time conversion — SQLite COUNT(*) return type not reliably inferred by sqlx offline macros. Kept runtime FromRow query with SAFETY comment and CAST. Commit deba5ab7.
entries.note: Convert to compile-time query_as! if a struct shape is appropriate.

entries.title: from-review hook error not explicitly logged — production debugging gap
entries.closure_note: V1.40 P4 T3: added tracing::warn! on create_finding_from_review errors in handler. Commit deba5ab7.
